title: Phase 32-PATCH — Controlled Scale Refinement: Final Report

what_was_patched.details: Minimum raised from 85 to 90. New 8-category scoring. Auto-reject triggers for demand=0, duplicate=0, trust=0, orphan=0, doorway=HIGH. Pages 80-89 = draft only. Below 80 = reject.

task_2_database_priority.key_change: 2 PRIMARY (loan + mortgage), 1 BACKUP (compound interest), 3 HELD (salary, FIRE, debt). Only 2 active initially.

task_3_first_100_revalidated.key_change: 0/25 pass 90. Honest audit reveals mass template approach fails. Must hand-craft 5-15 pages.

task_4_doorway_audit.key_change: 24/25 flagged DOORWAY_RISK. Classification system built. Structural fixes identified.

task_5_cron_policy.key_change: Phase 31 SAFE_RECOVERY stays primary. Phase 32 runs as planning/staging only. 5 transition gates defined. Earliest transition: Jun 24.

task_6_1m_milestones.key_change: Built backward from 1M. Probability lowered to 5-15%. New month-by-month targets with fail/scale triggers.

task_7_traffic_engines.key_change: 10 non-Google engines assessed. Prioritized: data hub → RSS → AI formatting → Bing → internal hub.

task_8_data_hub.key_change: Data hub upgraded to REQUIRED infrastructure. Must be built BEFORE batch deploy. 2 required sections: loan + mortgage tables.

task_9_batch1_preapproval.key_change: VERDICT: HOLD_FOR_FIXES. Batch restructured to 5 pages from 25. Each must be hand-crafted with unique use cases.

is_phase_32_1_ready: NO — Batch 1 must be rebuilt to 90+ quality first
what_blocks_phase_32_1: Batch 1 (25 pages) rejected — must rebuild as 5 hand-crafted pages at 90+
Data hub not yet built — required infrastructure
Phase 31 edit hold active until Jun 24 — some money pages still in measurement
No pages pass 90/100 quality gate yet — scoring system proving its value
Doorway audit reveals template approach creates duplication risk
what_is_ready: Full planning infrastructure (21 + 10 patch files = 31 files total)
Quality scoring system proven to catch thin/duplicate pages
Milestone model rebuilt with honest math
exact_next_action: Rebuild Batch 1 as 5 hand-crafted loan pages targeting 90+ quality. Each with unique use case, rich context, comparison tables, credit guidance. Submit for Auditor review before any deploy.
success_condition_met: YES — Phase 32-PATCH succeeded in making Phase 32 safe enough for controlled scaling by: raising quality gate, limiting active databases, auditing doorway risk, keeping Phase 31 cron primary, and requiring pre-approval gates.
on_track_off_track: OFF_TRACK (Phase 31 baseline unchanged: 0 clicks, 503 discovered-not-indexed). Phase 32-PATCH has NOT changed metrics — it has built SAFER infrastructure to change them.
risks_blocked: Mass thin page deployment — BLOCKED by 90/100 gate
All 6 databases running at once — BLOCKED by priority rules
Number-swap doorway pages — BLOCKED by doorway audit
Premature cron replacement — BLOCKED by transition policy
Unrealistic milestone expectations — CORRECTED with backward math
Deployment without pre-approval — BLOCKED by Auditor gate
